articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Bitcoin's wild days are over — and Trace Mayer says that's a good thing
articles.description: The creator of the Mayer Multiple argues bitcoin’s growing economic substance is compressing volatility and attracting deeper capital.

articles.title: Bitcoin price targets $78K as BTC holders defend 'strongest near-term support'
articles.description: Bitcoin’s bounce from a key holder cost-basis level has improved the case for further upside, with historical data pointing to $101,000 as a potential best-case target.

articles.title: Vietnam proposes allowing SMEs to use digital assets as loan collateral
articles.description: Vietnam’s Ministry of Finance has proposed letting SMEs use digital assets, virtual assets and intellectual property as loan collateral.

articles.title: Cosmos-based Gravity Bridge halts bridge after reported $5.4M exploit
articles.description: Gravity Bridge was drained of roughly $5.4 million in a suspected signing key compromise, prompting validators to halt the bridge while an investigation is underway.

articles.title: XRP Ledger's new proposal blocks the flash loan attacks costing DeFi hundreds of millions
articles.description: A draft XRPL amendment notes that flash loan attacks are "structurally impossible" on the network because of how its transactions are built, an architectural quirk that has spared the chain from the exploit class that has cost Ethereum DeFi billions.
